---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Motivation

What problem does this feature solve? Who benefits from it?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like. Include API design if relevant:

```ts
// Example API
const editor = OpenEdit.create('#editor', {
  myNewOption: true,
});
```

## Alternatives Considered

Are there other ways to solve this? Why is your proposal better?

## Additional Context

Any screenshots, links, or examples from other editors that do this well.
